summary: Passionate Jerry solo praised, but no details on recording quality
review: The reviewer is thrilled by a lengthy, emotionally charged Jerry Garcia guitar solo that “sends shivers down [their] spine,” recalling the 1985 era. No information is provided about the source or clarity of the recording.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong positive feedback on the performance (especially Jerry's solo) but no data on audio quality; rating reflects a good show with an unknown recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No comments about sound clarity, mix, or source type were made in the review.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific commentary on set structure or pacing.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia's solo described as a ten‑minute, onion‑peeling journey that sends shivers down the spine – highly praised.
